title: Rose of the Tenements
writer: John A. Moroso, J. Grubb Alexander
actors: Shirley Mason, John Harron, Evelyn Selbie
plot: Rose Rosetti, the orphaned daughter of a New York gangster, and Danny Lewis, another orphan, have been brought up by Sara and Abraham Kamisnsky, an elderly Jewish couple with an artificial-flower shop on the lower East Side. Rose ...
